import Mathlib

open MeasureTheory ProbabilityTheory

lemma condIndepFun_self_right
    (h_indep : Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z) (hY_meas : Measurable[mγ.comap Y] Y') :
    Y' ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z := by
  obtain ⟨φ, hφ_meas, h_eqY⟩ : ∃ φ, Measurable φ ∧ Y' = φ ∘ Y := hY_meas.exists_eq_measurable_comp
  rw [h_eqY]
  exact h_indep.comp hφ_meas measurable_id

lemma condIndepFun_of_measurable_right
    (h_indep : Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z) (hZ_meas : Measurable[mδ.comap Z] Z') :
    Y ⟂ᵢ[X, hX; μ] Z' := by
  obtain ⟨ψ, hψ_meas, h_eqZ⟩ : ∃ ψ, Measurable ψ ∧ Z' = ψ ∘ Z := hZ_meas.exists_eq_measurable_comp
  rw [h_eqZ]
  exact h_indep.comp measurable_id hψ_meas

end ProbabilityTheory

end Aux

  [StandardBorelSpace α] [Nonempty α]
  {A : ℕ → Ω → α} {R : ℕ → Ω → ℝ} {P : Measure Ω} [IsProbabilityMeasure P]
  {alg : Algorithm α ℝ} {ν : Kernel α ℝ} [IsMarkovKernel ν]
  {h_inter : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P}

local notation "𝔓'" => P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)

omit [DecidableEq α] [StandardBorelSpace α] [Nonempty α] in
lemma hasLaw_Z (a : α) (m : ℕ) :
  HasLaw (fun ω ↦ ω.2 m a) (ν a) 𝔓' where
  map_eq := by
    calc (𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ ω.2 m a)
    _ = ((𝔓').snd).map (fun ω ↦ ω m a) := by
      rw [Measure.snd, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      rfl
    _ = (Bandit.streamMeasure ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω m a) := by simp
    _ = ((Measure.infinitePi fun _ ↦ Measure.infinitePi ν).map (fun ω ↦ ω m)).map
        (fun ω ↦ ω a) := by
      rw [Bandit.streamMeasure, Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)]
      rfl
    _ = ν a := by simp_rw [(measurePreserving_eval_infinitePi _ _).map_eq]

/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event `s`. -/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " s "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|s])
/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event that `X` is in `s`. -/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " X " in " s "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|X ⁻¹' s])
/-- Law of `Y` conditioned on the event that `X` equals `x`. -/
notation "𝓛[" Y " | " X " ← " x "; " μ "]" => Measure.map Y (μ[|X ⁻¹' {x}])

local notation "𝔓t" => Bandit.trajMeasure alg ν
local notation "𝔓" => Bandit.measure alg ν

omit [DecidableEq α] in
lemma condDistrib_reward'' [StandardBorelSpace Ω] [Nonempty Ω] [Countable α]
    (h : IsAlgEnvSeq A R alg (stationaryEnv ν) P) (n : ℕ) :
    𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; 𝔓'] =ᵐ[(𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ A n ω.1)] ν := by
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R
  have h_ra' : 𝓛[R n | A n; P] =ᵐ[P.map (A n)] ν := h.condDistrib_reward_stationaryEnv n
  have h_law : (𝔓').map (fun ω ↦ A n ω.1) = P.map (A n) := by
    change ((𝔓').map (A n ∘ Prod.fst)) = _
    rw [← Measure.map_map (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop), ← Measure.fst, Measure.fst_prod]
  rw [h_law]
  have h_prod : 𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1; 𝔓']
      =ᵐ[P.map (A n)] 𝓛[R n | A n; P] :=
    condDistrib_fst_prod _ (by fun_prop) _
  filter_upwards [h_ra', h_prod] with ω h_eq h_prod
  rw [h_prod, h_eq]

    𝓛[fun ω ↦ R n ω.1 | fun ω ↦ A n ω.1 ← a; 𝔓'] = ν a := by
  have hA := h.measurable_A
  have hR := h.measurable_R

    push_neg at h
    rcases h with ⟨ω, h1, h2⟩
    have h1' : ∀ (k : ℕ), k < s → A k ω = a := by
      intro k hk
      have hne : rewardByCount A R a s ω ≠ 0 := h1
      simp [rewardByCount] at hne ⊢
      all_goals
        try { tauto }
        try { aesop }
    have h2' : ∀ (k : ℕ), k < t → A k ω = b := by
      intro k hk
      have hne : rewardByCount A R b t ω ≠ 0 := h2
      simp [rewardByCount] at hne ⊢
      all_goals
        try { tauto }
        try { aesop }
    by_cases hs : s = 0
    · -- If s = 0, then the condition is trivially true
      rw [hs] at h1
      simp [rewardByCount] at h1
    by_cases ht : t = 0
    · -- If t = 0, then the condition is trivially true
      rw [ht] at h2
      simp [rewardByCount] at h2
    · -- s > 0 and t > 0
      have hs' : s > 0 := by omega
      have ht' : t > 0 := by omega
      have h3 : A 0 ω = a := by
        apply h1' 0
        omega
      have h4 : A 0 ω = b := by
        apply h2' 0
        omega
      have h5 : a = b := by
        linarith [h3, h4]
      contradiction
  have h5 : ∀ (s t : ℕ), Measure.map (fun ω s_1 ↦ rewardByCount A R a s_1 ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)) {ω | rewardByCount A R a s ω ≠ 0} ⊥ Measure.map (fun ω s_1 ↦ rewardByCount A R b s_1 ω) (P.prod (Bandit.streamMeasure ν)) {ω | rewardByCount A R b t ω ≠ 0} := by
    intro s t
    have hdisj : Disjoint {ω | rewardByCount A R a s ω ≠ 0} {ω | rewardByCount A R b t ω ≠ 0} := h4 s t
    simp [hdisj]
  simpa using h5 s t
